src: A small, spiral-bound book with a light brown cover, titled "The Real Book Sixth Edition." The bold, black font stands out against the plain cover, giving it a classic look.
edit: A compact, spiral-bound book with an icy blue cover, titled "Family Memories Edition." White, elegant lettering adorns the cover, giving it a nostalgic yet modern appeal.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object is held in a hand up close, with a fan in the background adding a sense of movement. The setting is indoor with a wooden floor and minimalistic decor.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is lying flat on a black leather chair. The background consists of tiled flooring, giving a clean and orderly appearance.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is placed on a wooden desk. Around it, a computer and audio interface can be seen, indicating a workspace setup.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object rests on a wooden table, partially opened to the side. In the background, a cluttered desk with various electronic gadgets is visible.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object is positioned against the keys of a piano. The shiny black surface of the piano and a light-colored wall make up the backdrop.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object is held in a hand up close, surrounded by a snowy winter backdrop. The setting is indoor with frosty windows and light wooden floorboards.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object is lying flat on a chair covered in white faux fur, creating a winter setting. The background features a floor with frosty, glassy tiles.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is placed on a wooden desk amidst a winter-themed decor. Frosted computer and audio interface, with gentle blue lighting, can be seen.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object rests on a wooden table, partially opened, surrounded by a winter-themed workspace. The background includes snowflake patterns and frosted electronic gadgets.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object is positioned against a piano with a snowy, winter setting. The shimmering surface of the piano reflects icicle patterns against a light blue wall.

prompt_shared: a book with titled Family memories
